hero.subtitle: Portfolio 2024
hero.title: Web & Mobile Developer
hero.bio: 27-year-old developer expert in the JavaScript ecosystem. With 6 years of experience, I build ultra-performant mobile and web applications using React Native and Next.js. Passionate about innovation, I now integrate Artificial Intelligence into my projects to push the boundaries of user experience.

freelance.desc: Diverse freelance work: creation of two e-commerce sites with Hydrogen and Shopify, development of several showcase websites, and design of SaaS products as personal projects.

superconnectr.desc: Development and optimization of a mobile networking app. Implementation of critical features and integration of a real-time messaging system with SendBird.

deweto.desc: Design and deployment of e-commerce and business showcase sites. Product catalog configuration, payment systems, and conversion rate optimization.

alternance.desc: Enriching work-study path across three innovative startups. Dynamic UI development with VueJS, robust backend architecture with Laravel and Symfony.

contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.description: Available as a freelancer or full-time in Lyon and surroundings. Let's talk about your ideas and bring your vision to life together.

realisations.subtitle: Portfolio
realisations.description: A selection of recent projects showcasing my expertise in Shopify e-commerce development and modern web creation.
realisations.ctaDescription: E-commerce, showcase site or custom application — let's discuss your project and bring it to life together.

plotsTerrasse.subtitle: Shopify E-commerce
plotsTerrasse.description: Complete e-commerce site for selling adjustable pedestals and terrace equipment. Intuitive interface with integrated pedestal calculator, advanced product catalog and optimized purchasing experience for professionals and individuals.

bullehitVape.subtitle: Shopify E-commerce
bullehitVape.description: Premium online store for vape products. Immersive design with a dark and colorful visual universe, product catalog with advanced filters, and physical store integration in Lyon 7th. Polished user experience from browsing to checkout.

dewetoAgency.subtitle: Agency Showcase Site
dewetoAgency.description: Showcase site for my personal web agency. Modern and clean design with fluid animations, services presentation, portfolio of projects and contact form. Optimized for conversion and SEO.
